name: New Claim - Link Never Arrived (Re-send)
description: Caller says the link never arrived and wants it resent.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: You were supposed to text me the warranty link an hour ago and I never got it.
expectedOutcome: Agent re-confirms the destination, re-sends via the chosen channel, offers the alternate channel if it keeps failing, respects duplicate-send limits.
expectedMilestones: alternate channel offered on repeat failure
